summary: Frontend-only testing completed successfully. All 6 requested features verified working: Landing page WBUK branding, chat session creation, admin login styling, admin authentication, dashboard display, and navigation. Previous Select component issue appears to be resolved.
passed_tests: Landing page loads with WBUK branding (red accents #C41E3A, white background, Montserrat font)
WBUK Logo (WB/UK) and AI Triage Service heading visible
Start Confidential Chat button creates session and navigates to /chat/{sessionToken}
Chat page displays welcome message, chat input, send button with WBUK styling
Admin Login page styling matches WBUK brand (red card border, centered layout)
Admin login with andyd358@hotmail.com / WBUKAdmin2026! works correctly
Admin Dashboard displays with WBUK branding (red header border, styled stat cards)
Dashboard shows Total Cases, New Cases, In Progress, High Priority stats
Status filter dropdown works (All Statuses, New, Under Review, etc.)
Priority filter dropdown works (All Priorities, P1, P2, P3)
Case row click navigates to case detail page
Case detail page shows Executive Summary, Classification, Legal Assessment, Risk Assessment
Back to dashboard navigation works correctly
Logout navigation returns to admin login page
critical_code_review_comments: All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
WBUK branding color (#C41E3A) consistently applied throughout the app
Previous Select component empty value issue has been resolved
seed_data_creation: One test case exists: WBUK-2026-36A2A534 with government department procurement fraud scenario
context_for_next_testing_agent: All frontend features working correctly. Admin dashboard Select filters work properly now. One case exists in the system for testing case management features. Admin credentials: andyd358@hotmail.com / WBUKAdmin2026!
